title: Senior Doctor - 3M India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - 3M India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!
